comment: LIVE side of the watch. Update BY HAND when a new result appears (new JUNO release, SO/LiteBIRD beta, DESI DR3, NA62 final, CMB-S4 running...): add a new entry with source/date and set 'record': true on the entry that should drive the channel status (leave the old ones for history). Initial fill 2026-07-22 from the scorecard data_values / experiment measurement files. Convention: sigma_plus/sigma_minus for asymmetric errors; 'exclusion_sigma' for exclusion-type channels (w = -1); 'upper_limit' for limits.

sin2_theta12.source: JUNO 2025 first oscillation result; mirrored in experiments/neutrino-mixing/data/measurements.json

beta_birefringence_deg.source: ACT DR6 EB birefringence, arXiv:2509.13654 (systematics-limited: instrument-polarisation-angle calibration)

w_dark_energy.source: DESI DR2 arXiv:2503.14738; strongest SURVIVING overlap-aware frequentist exclusion of w=-1 (Union3 not recalibrated; Bayesian only 2.23 sigma, arXiv:2603.05472)
arXiv:2511.07517 (DES-SN5YR calibration error found; 4.2 -> 3.2 sigma); details in experiments/dark-energy-w-watchdog/data/measurements.json
arXiv:2603.05472: ln B = -0.57 +- 0.26 favouring LCDM -- the CMB-only preference is ELIMINATED

br_kplus_pinunu.source: NA62 arXiv:2604.12649 (scorecard row 'rare kaon BR(K+ -> pi+ nu nu)')

alpha_s_running.source: Calabrese+ 2025 JCAP (record leg per scorecard row 'inflation alpha_s')

n_s.source: Planck 2018 VI (scorecard row 'inflation n_s'); DESI-combined values run higher -- watch DR3

r_tensor.source: BK18 r_0.05 < 0.036 (95% CL); CMB-S4 forecast sigma(r) ~ 5e-4
